Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Jade]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Advancing to Jade remakes the body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 14''' — Jade is a stage of advancement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Jade is a stage or rank within the school's hierarchy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — A battle between Jades is a significant level of combat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Gold is a qualitative leap beyond Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — Jade is battle-ready.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 20''' — Jade is a stage that can be reached from Foundation using two and a half pills.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — At the Jade stage, one can use their spirit to sense.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — Jade is a stage of advancement for sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — In Sacred Valley, people at the Jade stage can use their spirit to sense things.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Jade is a stage of advancement above Iron.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A Jade would have sensed Gesha's approach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Jade is capable of catching a Remnant's approach.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 10''' — Jade is a place where the Patriarch of the Wei clan is located.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 14''' — Lindon has raised his pure core to Jade.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 1''' — Lindon has developed an extra sense for perception after growing to Jade.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 4''' — Full-body Enforcement can be sensed by anyone Jade or higher.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Jades are individuals in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — Jades are a group of people who use techniques and can be trained as Enforcers.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — Jade is a stage of power or growth that people in Sacred Valley are being suppressed at.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 6''' — The old woman was a Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Jade is a rank or stage that Orthos and Kelsa currently hold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 7''' — Lindon threw a full-grown Jade in his hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 9''' — Jade is a rank or stage held by some guards of the Fallen Leaf School.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — A Jade is able to sense Lindon's power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 11''' — Spiritual pressure can be used on those under Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 12''' — The Heaven's Glory group includes half as many Jades as Irons.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Jade refers to a level of spiritual perception or rank.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 13''' — Eithan is little better than a genuine Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen was still Jade.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 4''' — Without his veil, Lindon might be perceived as a Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — Advancing to Jade would fix problems caused by the Remnant's eyes.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Jaran advanced to Jade.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — Jade is a level of power or stage in Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 35''' — Jades are individuals who can prostrate themselves.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
